DOWNFALL-TO_HAND: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DOWNFALL-TO_TOP: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to put on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DOWNFALL-TO_APPLY: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to apply effects.
DOWNFALL-TO_DECK: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
DOWNFALL-TO_STASIS: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to put into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
DOWNFALL-TO_OTHER_HANDS: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to add to another player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
